records.question: What people from Los Alcarrizos who are at least 1.72 meters tall have gymnastic scores where the horizontal bar points are exactly 9.55, parallel bars points are exactly 9.625, rings points are at most 9.712, pommel horse points are at least 9.525, and total points are at most 57.374?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN gymnast ON people.people_id = gymnast.gymnast_id
WHERE gymnast.rings_points <= 9.712 AND gymnast.pommel_horse_points >= 9.525 AND gymnast.total_points <= 57.374 AND people.hometown = 'Los Alcarrizos' AND people.height >= 1.72 AND gymnast.horizontal_bar_points = 9.55 AND gymnast.parallel_bars_points = 9.625
records.pred_sql:
SELECT people.People_ID
FROM gymnast
INNER JOIN people ON gymnast.Gymnast_ID = people.People_ID
WHERE people.Hometown = 'Los Alcarrizos'
  AND people.Height >= 1.72
  AND gymnast.Horizontal_Bar_Points = 9.55
  AND gymnast.Parallel_Bars_Points = 9.625
  AND gymnast.Rings_Points <= 9.712
  AND gymnast.Pommel_Horse_Points >= 9.525
  AND gymnast.Total_Points <= 57.374
